mapper.sql: id, user_id, available_points, total_points, version, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_points_account (user_id, available_points, total_points, version, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{availablePoints}, #{totalPoints}, #{version}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_points_account SET available_points = #{availablePoints}, total_points = #{totalPoints}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND version = #{version}
